title: abm991's Zombie Infection
body:
# Zombie Virus Mod
## Game Mechanics
When attacked by a zombie, you have a **70% chance** to receive the Zombie Virus effect.
The infection has **four stages**:

1. **Stage 1: Zombie Virus**
   Particle effects appear around your body, accompanied by a hunger effect.

2. **Stage 2: Infected**
   Your screen turns green and transparent, simulating zombie vision.

3. **Stage 3: Severely Infected**
   Your screen turns dark green and transparent.

4. **Stage 4: Out of Control**
   Your body no longer belongs to you (the zombie still wears the player’s equipped items).
   You will turn against your allies and fight each other.

## Prevention & Protection
- Wear more armor. At full armor, resistance can reach up to **80%**.
  Combined with the Zombie Virus Vaccine, resistance increases to **110%** (you become completely immune to infection).
- Avoid being attacked by zombies.
- **Zombie Virus Vaccine**: Grants the player **20% virus resistance**.
- **Zombie Virus Serum**: Completely cures the virus (commands / milk have **no effect**).

## Effects
- Zombie Virus
- Infected
- Severely Infected

## Items
- Zombie Virus Vaccine
- Zombie Virus Serum
